title: The firefighting system of the Van der Heyden brothers in 17th century Amsterdam
summary: 本文讲述了17世纪阿姆斯特丹范德海登兄弟发明的消防系统，包括消防泵和软管，对现代消防有重要影响。
translated_summary: The article discusses the firefighting system invented by the Van der Heyden brothers in 17th century Amsterdam, including fire pumps and hoses, which had a significant impact on modern firefighting.
